concerns: The failure was caused by repo-owned native processes holding files under desktop/src-tauri/target/debug, including cc-jiangxia-desktop.exe and claude-sidecar.exe.
This is a local process/lock issue rather than a source-level build bug, so it may recur if a Tauri dev session is left running during native checks.
recovery_hints: If native checks fail again with Os code 5 / PermissionDenied, stop any live repo-owned cargo, cc-jiangxia-desktop.exe, and claude-sidecar.exe processes before rerunning.
Keep cleanup bounded to desktop/src-tauri/target only; do not broaden deletion outside repo build outputs.
